questionText: Do you include emissions pertaining to your business activity(ies) in your direct operations as part of your global gross Scope 1 figure?
questionKo: 귀사는 include emissions pertaining to your business activity(ies) in your 직접 운영사업장 as part of your global gross Scope 1 figure입니까?
sectorTags: Agricultural commodities, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry
simpleHelp: This question gathers data on whether an emissions figure has been calculated for activities pertaining this sector, taking place within your organizational boundary, and is being reported as part of your gross Scope 1. This informs data users on whether your Scope 1 figure is representative of your business' activities and their associated climate-related impacts.

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Own land only" or "Value chain (including own land)" in response to column "Relevance of emissions and/or water-related impacts" for the "Production" row of 1.11, or you select "Direct operations" or "Both direct operations and upstream/downstream value chain" in response to column " Relevance of emissions and/or water-related impacts" for the "Processing/Manufacturing" or "Distribution" rows of 1.11.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 only appears 만약 you select "Own land only" 또는 "가치사슬 (포함 own land)" in response to 열 "Relevance of emissions 및/또는 water-related impacts" 에 대한 "Production" 행 of 1.11, 또는 you select "직접 운영사업장" 또는 "Both 직접 운영사업장 및 upstream/다운스트림 가치사슬" in response to 열 " Relevance of emissions 및/또는 water-related impacts" 에 대한 "프로세스ing/Manufacturing" 또는 "Distribution" 행 of 1.11.

guidance.text:
General 
If your organization has calculated emissions from your relevant business activities (i.e. agricultural/forestry, processing/manufacturing and/or distribution) and these emissions are included in the global gross Scope 1 emissions figure reported in 7.6, please select "Yes", if these emissions have been included in their entirety, or "Partially", if some of these emissions were included. Otherwise, select "No". 
The GHG Protocol has developed new Land Sector and Removals Standard (LSRS) and Guidance. Due to the timeline of publication, organizations are not yet able to report emissions and removals in line with the LSRS in CDP's 2026 corporate questionnaire. Organizations responding to this question during the 2026 disclosure cycle should report in accordance with other GHG Protocol corporate standards.
guidance.textKo: 일반 만약 귀사 has calculated emissions from your 관련 business activities (i.e. agricultural/forestry, 프로세스ing/manufacturing 및/또는 distribution) 및 these emissions are included in the global gross Scope 1 배출량 figure 보고 in 7.6, please select "예", 만약 these emissions have been included in their entirety, 또는 "Partially", 만약 some 의se emissions were included. Otherwise, select "아니요". The GHG Protocol has developed 신규 Land Sector 및 Removals Standard (LSRS) 및 Guidance. Due to the timeline of 공개ation, organizations are not yet able to report emissions 및 removals in line with the LSRS in CDP's 2026 corporate 질문서. Organizations responding to this 문항 during the 2026 공시 cycle 해야 합니다 report in accordance with other GHG Protocol corporate 기준.

criteria.criteria:
Any option selected - 1.5 points
A maximum of 1.5/1.5 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 선택지가 하나라도 선택된 경우 - 1.5 점 A 최고 of 1.5/1.5 점 is available for this 문항.

criteria.criteria:
Either 'Yes' OR 'Partially' selected - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: Either '예' 또는 'Partially' 선택 - 1 점 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다.

simpleHelpKo: This 문항 gathers data on whether an emissions figure has been calculated for activities 관련 this sector, taking place within your 조직경계, 및 is being 보고 의 일부로 your gross Scope 1. This informs 데이터 사용자 on whether your Scope 1 figure is representative of your business' activities 및 their associated climate-related impacts.
